description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named CI that handles building, testing, and deploying a C++ project across multiple platforms including Linux, Windows, macOS, Emscripten, and WASI. The workflow should trigger on push to main and pull requests to main, and it should include steps for setting up environments, installing dependencies, building, testing, parsing C++ source files with different toolchains, and uploading artifacts. It also includes jobs for building and deploying a playground.
